DP.364.0000:
This bright red Berry is very spicy and
has a provocative flavor. It blooms with
delicate, pretty flowers.
DP.364.0001:
This Berry’s thick skin and fruit are
very tough and dry tasting. However,
every bit of it can be eaten.
DP.364.0002:
Because of its hollow inside pocket,
there isn’t a lot to eat. What can be
eaten is very sweet and delicious.
DP.364.0003:
If the leaves grow longer and curlier
than average, this Berry will have
a somewhat-bitter taste.
DP.364.0004:
This Berry’s peel is hard, but the flesh
inside is very juicy. It is distinguished
by its bracing sourness.
DP.364.0005:
It takes longer to grow than Berries
such as Cheri. The smaller Berries
taste better.
DP.364.0006:
Nature’s gifts came together as one in
this Berry. It has a wondrous mix of
flavors that spread in the mouth.
DP.364.0007:
The more this Berry absorbs energy
from sunlight, the more vividly
colorful it grows.
DP.364.0008:
This Berry’s gradual process of storing
nutrients beneficial to Pokémon health
causes it to mature slowly.
DP.364.0009:
Sitrus came from the same family as
Oran. It is larger and smoother tasting
than Oran.
DP.364.0010:
This Berry is oddly shaped, appearing
as if someone took a bite out of it.
It is packed full of spicy substances.
DP.364.0011:
It is said that this Berry grew lumps
to help Pokémon grip it, allowing
propagation farther afield.
DP.364.0012:
This Berry progressively curves as
it grows. The curvier the Berry, the
sweeter and tastier.
DP.364.0013:
This Berry turns bitter toward the
stem. The dainty flower it grows
from doesn’t absorb much sunlight.
DP.364.0014:
This Berry is very big and sour.
The juiciness of the pulp accentuates
the sourness.
DP.364.0015:
A small hint of spiciness lingers in the
red granules surrounding this Berry.
Their centers have a dry taste.
DP.364.0016:
Though this small, delicately skinned
Berry is blue in color, it dyes the
mouth black when eaten.
DP.364.0017:
Bitter, but with a trace of sweetness,
the Nanab Berry was the seventh
to be discovered in the world.
DP.364.0018:
The potent mix of bitter and sour in
this Berry seems to promote digestion.
The flower is white and beautiful.
DP.364.0019:
It is said that when the sour skin is
peeled, this spicy Berry can be
crushed to make medicine.
DP.364.0020:
When this sweetly spicy Berry’s thick
skin is peeled, many pieces of the
fruit spill out.
DP.364.0021:
This Berry can be eaten as is or
boiled to obtain an extract that adds
a dash of flavor to food.
DP.364.0022:
Even in places of constant rain and
high humidity, this Berry’s plant
grows healthy and strong.
DP.364.0023:
This somewhat-rare Berry projects
an image of luxury, so it is favored
as a gift item.
DP.364.0024:
One bite of this very tender Berry
fills the mouth with its sweet
and tangy flavor.
DP.364.0025:
This Berry is large and spicy. When
eaten during the cold season, it
warms the body from inside.
DP.364.0026:
Its dryness is quite strong. As a
result, its true deliciousness can’t be
appreciated by just eating one or two.
DP.364.0027:
The grown-up flavor and dreamy
sweetness of this Berry make it a
favorite of Pokémon everywhere.
DP.364.0028:
Even though it is bitter, it should be
eaten peel and all. The hair on the peel
cleans the stomach from the inside.
DP.364.0029:
This Berry is quite sour overall, with
the sourness especially concentrated
at the pointed end.
DP.364.0030:
So spicy is the Spelon Berry that, Fire
type or not, Pokémon will try to
breathe fire after eating a single one.
DP.364.0031:
This Berry drifted from a faraway sea.
It is now cultivated in the Sinnoh
region.
DP.364.0032:
A bounty of nature that is exceedingly
sweet. The Berry is huge, with some
discovered that exceed 20 inches.
DP.364.0033:
This Berry is tremendously bitter.
Just one bite is enough to instantly
stop hiccups.
DP.364.0034:
This glossy and colorful Berry has a
mouthwateringly delicious appearance.
However, it is awfully sour.
DP.364.0035:
This Berry is said to have grown
plentiful in the tropics of the past. It
boasts an intensely hot spiciness.
DP.364.0036:
This Berry’s flesh is dotted with
countless tiny bubbles of air that keep
it afloat in water.
DP.364.0037:
Energy from lightning strikes is drawn
into the plant, making the Berries
grow big and rich.
DP.364.0038:
This Berry has a disagreeable “green”
flavor and scent typical of vegetables.
It is rich in health-promoting fiber.
DP.364.0039:
This Berry has a refreshing flavor that
strikes a good balance of dryness and
sourness. It tastes better chilled.
DP.364.0040:
This Berry contains a substance that
generates heat. It can even heat up a
chilly heart.
DP.364.0041:
This Berry is a brilliant green on the
outside. Inside, it is packed with a
dry-flavored, black-colored flesh.
DP.364.0042:
The sweetness-laden pulp has just the
hint of a hard-edged and fragrant bite
to it.
DP.364.0043:
This Berry is said to be a new kind
that is a cross of two Berries brought
together by winds from far away.
DP.364.0044:
This Berry is said to sense human
emotions for the way it swells
roundly when a person approaches.
DP.364.0045:
The flower grows at the tip of this
Berry. It attracts Bug Pokémon by
letting its stringy petals stream out.
DP.364.0046:
It is often used for pickles because of
its very dry flavor. It can also be
eaten raw for its provocative taste.
DP.364.0047:
Considered to have a special power from
the olden days, this Berry is sometimes
dried and used as a good-luck charm.
DP.364.0048:
If a large enough volume of this Berry
is boiled down, its bitterness fades
away. It makes a good jam.
DP.364.0049:
Tiny hooks grow on the surface of this
Berry. It latches on to Pokémon so it
can be carried to far-off places.
DP.364.0050:
This Berry is very tough with a strong
flavor. It was used to make medicine
by people in the past.
DP.364.0051:
This Berry can be cored out and dried
to make a whistle. Blowing through its
hole makes an indescribable sound.
DP.364.0052:
This Berry is surrounded by mystery.
It is rumored to be imbued with the
power of the sea.
DP.364.0053:
This Berry is surrounded by mystery.
It is rumored to be imbued with the
power of the land.
DP.364.0054:
This Berry is surrounded by mystery.
It is rumored to be imbued with the
power of the sky.
DP.364.0055:
This Berry is surrounded by mystery.
It is rumored to be imbued with the
power of all living things.
DP.364.0056:
This is a very, very mystifying Berry.
There is no telling how it can be used,
or what may happen if it is used.
DP.364.0057:
This is said to be a legendary Berry.
Holding it supposedly brings great
joy.
DP.364.0058:
This Berry is considered a mirage.
It was said to be so strong that it had
to be abandoned at the world’s edge.
DP.364.0059:
A completely enigmatic Berry.
It apparently has the power of the
stars that fill the night sky.
DP.364.0060:
This Berry has a very dry flavor.
It has the effect of making other food
eaten at the same time taste sweet.
DP.364.0061:
The flesh underneath the Custap
Berry’s tough skin is sweet and
creamy soft.
DP.364.0062:
The cluster of drupelets that make
up this Berry pop rhythmically if
the Berry is handled roughly.
DP.364.0063:
In days of old, people worked the top-
shaped pieces of this Berry free and
used them as toys.
